awards.title: 🏆 The 2025 Motohisa Kanda Award
awards.desc: E. A. Rashed (and co-authors) received the 2025 Motohisa Kanda Award from IEEE EMC Society

recognitions.title: 🏅 General Chair of 2026 IEEE FMLDS
